summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 new features for Orbit360 Engine iteration 5: Flexible AI Provider system, Hebrew Calendar, Digital Guides agent, and Affiliate Finder agent. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All 4 new frontend pages load correctly with proper UI elements. Sidebar navigation updated with new items. No regressions on existing endpoints.
passed_tests: GET /api/settings/ai returns default AI settings with provider 'emergent'
PUT /api/settings/ai saves AI settings correctly (verified with GET)
GET /api/agents/guides returns empty list initially
DELETE /api/agents/guides/{id} returns 404 for non-existent guide
GET /api/agents/affiliates returns empty list initially
DELETE /api/agents/affiliates/{id} returns 404 for non-existent search
Regression: GET /api/folders still works (4 folders)
Regression: GET /api/content/items still works
Regression: GET /api/settings/marketing-dna still works
Regression: GET /api/backup/export still works
Regression: /manifest.json still served
Frontend: Dashboard loads correctly with Orbit360 Engine header
Frontend: Sidebar has new nav items (calendar, AI settings)
Frontend: Sidebar has AI Agents section (guides, affiliates)
Frontend: AI Settings page loads at /ai-settings with all 5 provider buttons
Frontend: AI Settings shows API key input when non-emergent provider selected
Frontend: AI Settings has STT provider section with 4 options
Frontend: AI Settings has save button
Frontend: Hebrew Calendar page loads at /calendar with calendar grid
Frontend: Hebrew Calendar shows Hebrew dates alongside Gregorian
Frontend: Hebrew Calendar highlights holidays (e.g., Passover)
Frontend: Hebrew Calendar has today button
Frontend: Digital Guides page loads at /guides with topic input
Frontend: Digital Guides has audience and chapters inputs
Frontend: Digital Guides has generate button
Frontend: Affiliate Finder page loads at /affiliates with niche input
Frontend: Affiliate Finder has keywords input
Frontend: Affiliate Finder has search button
Frontend: Settings page still loads with backup section

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 new pages load correctly, sidebar updated)

seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing data and empty lists
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 adds 4 new features: 1) AI Settings page (/ai-settings) with flexible provider selection (Emergent, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, OpenAI-Compatible), 2) Hebrew Calendar page (/calendar) with dual Hebrew/Gregorian dates and holiday highlighting, 3) Digital Guides agent (/guides) for generating guide structures and marketing materials, 4) Affiliate Finder agent (/affiliates) for finding affiliate programs. POST endpoints for guide/affiliate generation call external AI and should not be tested in automated tests. No authentication required.
